interface.short_description: 高质量 HTML 幻灯片，零依赖单文件，22 种风格预设

hooks.matcher: install.*plugin|plugin.*install|安装.*幻灯|幻灯.*安装|安装.*ppt|安装.*演示
hooks.prompt: The user is asking to install the slide-creator plugin. Guide them to run: `xiaok plugin install kai-slide-creator`. If they explicitly asked you to install it (e.g., '帮我安装幻灯片插件'), you can run that command directly.
